One-time setup. After this, we press Play for you every movie night.

STEP 1
What do you watch on?
📷
Take a photo of your TV
or remote — we’ll figure it out

Photo is used to identify your device only. Not saved.

or pick manually:

TV
TV app built into my TV
▭
Streaming stick or box
?
Console / cable / other

Good. Next: choose your TV or device.

STEP 2
Which device?

Tap your device.

▣
Roku / Roku TV
One-time setup. Works over Wi-Fi.
Auto Play (beta)
F
Fire TV / Android TV / Google TV
One-time setup, about 5 min. Needs Developer Options.
Auto Play (beta)
V
VIZIO TV
Pair once with an on-screen code.
Auto Play (beta)
LG
LG TV
Pair once through your TV.
Auto Play (beta)
S
Samsung TV
Pair once through your TV.
Auto Play (beta)
B
Sony TV
Needs IP Control enabled. Limited models.
Auto Play (beta)

Setup stays on your device. Nothing is shared.
